title: Need image of Eva 20 not 222 eyecatch
display_title: Need image of Eva 20 not 222 eyecatch
wikitext:
[]: Need image of Eva 2.0 (not 2.22) eyecatch             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Aug 02, 2011 8:58 am I've been working on little refinements on my site (see sig at bottom) and I've run into one little problem. While I was able to find a screencap of the original Evangelion 1.0 (not 1.x) eye catch (see below), I haven't been able to do the same for 2.0 (and not 2.22). It seems that I can't copy/paste the "0" from 1.0 / 1.01 onto the 2.22 eyecatch since they changed the font type for 1.11 / 2.22's eyecatch (from 1.0x's tall and skinny to a more standard, proportional font.) Can anyone help? Example of original 1.0 eyecatch for comparison: Image of 2.0 eyecatch from the (in)famous camrip:

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Tue Aug 02, 2011 10:44 pm
